name: Sichuan Beef and Snow Peas Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice beef against the grain into thin strips.
2. In a bowl, combine 1 tablespoon each of cornstarch and soy sauce, sherry, and garlic. Stir in the beef. Let stand for 15 minutes.
3. In another bowl, blend the remaining 1 tablespoon cornstarch, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, red pepper, and 3/4 cup water.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat. Add beef and stir-fry for 1 minute; remove.
5. Heat the remaining tablespoon of oil in the same pan. Add snow peas and onion; stir-fry for 3 minutes.
6. Return the beef to the pan. Add the soy sauce mixture and tomato. Cook, stirring, until the sauce boils and thickens and the tomato is heated through.
